title: podman system df shows much less disk usage than du /var/lib/containers/storage
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

Also, there is a running list of known issues in the [Podman Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md),
please reference that page before opening a new issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug



**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. use podman, run `podman system prune`

2. run `podman system df` and check the size of /var/lib/containers/storage, notice a big difference

**Describe the results you received:**
on one machine
```
podman system df
TYPE           TOTAL       ACTIVE      SIZE        RECLAIMABLE
Images         17          16          2.571GB     350.7MB (0%)
Containers     38          37          342.5MB     0B (0%)
Local Volumes  31          16          2.462GB     524.3kB (0%)
```

```
du -hs /var/lib/containers/storage/        
13G	/var/lib/containers/storage/
```
```
du -hs --apparent-size /var/lib/containers/storage/ 
11G	/var/lib/containers/storage/
```
on another
```
~# podman system df
TYPE           TOTAL       ACTIVE      SIZE        RECLAIMABLE
Images         9           9           1.485GB     0B (0%)
Containers     23          19          2.476MB     8.001kB (0%)
Local Volumes  9           7           387.8MB     0B (0%)
~# du -hs /var/lib/containers/storage
6.3G	/var/lib/containers/storage
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
should be about the same size?

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:      3.2.3
API Version:  3.2.3
Go Version:   go1.15.13
Built:        Tue Aug 10 22:05:24 2021
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```
      go: go1.15.13
      libseccomp: 2.5.1
  os: linux
  remoteSocket:
    exists: true
    path: /run/podman/podman.sock
  security:
    apparmorEnabled: false
    capabilities: CAP_NET_RAW,CAP_CHOWN,CAP_DAC_OVERRIDE,CAP_FOWNER,CAP_FSETID,CAP_KILL,CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE,CAP_SETFCAP,CAP_SETGID,CAP_SETPCA
P,CAP_SETUID,CAP_SYS_CHROOT
    rootless: false
    seccompEnabled: true
    seccompProfilePath: /usr/share/containers/seccomp.json
    selinuxEnabled: false
  serviceIsRemote: false
  slirp4netns:
    executable: ""
    package: ""
    version: ""
  swapFree: 555892736
  swapTotal: 2147475456
  uptime: 278h 13m 18.22s (Approximately 11.58 days)
registries:
  search:
  - registry.access.redhat.com
  - registry.redhat.io
  - docker.io
store:
  configFile: /etc/containers/storage.conf
  containerStore:
    number: 38
    paused: 0
    running: 37
    stopped: 1
  graphDriverName: overlay
  graphOptions:
    overlay.mountopt: nodev,metacopy=on
  graphRoot: /var/lib/containers/storage
  graphStatus:
    Backing Filesystem: extfs
    Native Overlay Diff: "false"
    Supports d_type: "true"
    Using metacopy: "true"
  imageStore:
    number: 17
  runRoot: /run/containers/storage
  volumePath: /var/lib/containers/storage/volumes
version:
  APIVersion: 3.2.3
  Built: 1628633124
  BuiltTime: Tue Aug 10 22:05:24 2021
  GitCommit: ""
  GoVersion: go1.15.13
  OsArch: linux/amd64
  Version: 3.2.3
```

comments.body: could you run `find /var/lib/containers/storage/` and share the output?

It seems like there may be stuff in the `find` output that is better off not public but I am happy to share it privately. 

I wonder if this issue is already known, as suggested by https://access.redhat.com/solutions/5822921 (to which I do not have access)
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

are there containers running when you run `du`?

Do you get the same result if you add `--one-file-system` to `du`?

> are there containers running when you run du?
yes

> Do you get the same result if you add --one-file-system to du?
It's closer, but still not quite matching:

~# podman system df
TYPE           TOTAL       ACTIVE      SIZE        RECLAIMABLE
Images         25          18          3.629GB     1.05GB (0%)
Containers     39          38          409.5MB     0B (0%)
Local Volumes  34          18          3.734GB     655.4kB (0%)

~# du -hs /var/lib/containers/storage/
19G	/var/lib/containers/storage/

~# du -hs --apparent-size /var/lib/containers/storage/
16G	/var/lib/containers/storage/

# du -hs --one-file-system  /var/lib/containers/storage/                
13G	/var/lib/containers/storage/

~# du -hs --one-file-system --apparent-size /var/lib/containers/storage/
9.7G	/var/lib/containers/storage/
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
SInce no response, I am going to assume it is fixed, reopen if I am mistaken.
